## Safety and privacy checklist

- [ ] Synthetic fixtures only
- [ ] No personal RFID data included
- [ ] No real UIDs, dumps, keys, templates, backups, BIN/EML files, audit logs, screenshots with card data, paths, environment files, or local configuration included
- [ ] Technology capability status remains accurate
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed
- [ ] All visible UI text remains i18n-ready
